Appearances:
Plaintiff Community Housing Partnership is present. Represented by Charles Byrd.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lee Williams is present.
Attorney Elle Lewis representing the defendant through limited scope.

The trial date of NOV-28-2011 is vacated.
